title: MoreFPS (discontinued)
description: This ModPack makes your Minecraft much more optimized than normal!!
body:
## Attention!! I, "The creator of the mod," am Brazilian and I don't know much English, so I'm using automatic translation and trying to adjust and make the writing as close as possible to what I want to say. So if you notice any incorrect text or very "basic" English, I apologize ;-;

___________

# See My Other Projects Too!!

<details>
<summary>PROJECTS</summary>
  
### **[MoreStructure](https://modrinth.com/mod/morestrustures)** | [Mod] | Add more structures to Minecraft!!
  
![view](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3b796bccf1cfa9e91151f69a3f4aa1251e3ea521_0.webp)

<details>
<summary>ALL DETAILS</summary>

## Attention!! I, "The creator of the mod," am Brazilian and I don't know much English, so I'm using automatic translation and trying to adjust and make the writing as close as possible to what I want to say. So if you notice any incorrect text or very "basic" English, I apologize ;-;

___________

## This mod adds more structures to your Minecraft!

### The added structures are:
1 Abandoned Houses | Adds abandoned houses to your world
   with a chest and some mobs!
________________________________ 
2 Villager Houses | Adds villager houses to your world
   with a chest, two villagers, and an iron golem.
   It is compatible with the Guard Villager mod, which spawns
   two guard villagers in the house!
________________________________
3 Dungeon | Adds two-story dungeons to your world
   with lots of great items , lots of hostile mobs end
   the **Boss|Zombie**
________________________________
4 Buried Treasure | Adds Minecraft wells to your world
   but these wells have hidden chests underneath them.
   They make the wells have a 50% chance of being a well 
   with a chest or a 50% chance of being a normal Minecraft well!
________________________________
**The next structures will only be generated in version 1.1.0 onwards!!**
   
5 Dungeon of Nether | Adds Minecraft dungeons of nether
   to your world This structure can only be generated in the
   Nether. It is the same as the "Dungeon" structure, but it has
   better loot, stronger mobs, and the **Boss|Piglin Brute**
   
________________________________

## What it requires to work:
**Fabric:** download the Fabric API mod , link [here!](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api/version/0.92.6+1.20.1)

**Quilt:** download the Fabric API mod , link [here!](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api/version/0.92.6+1.20.1)

The others don't need anything to function.

________________________________

### Any problems with the mod? Tell me about the problem on GitHub so I can fix it! :)

**GitHub**:[Tell me about the mod's issues!!](https://github.com/MiguelYT0d/MoreStructures)
</details>

# PortableHomes
**Attention!!** "The description describes the most recent mod! So if you read 
somethingthat is in the mod description but is not in the mod itself, it is very 
likely that this mod isan outdated version.!!"
### Updated mod versions below!!!
**Forge V1.20.1**: V1.0.1

**Forge V1.19.2**: V1.0.0

**Fabric and Quilt V1.20 and 1.20.1**: V1.0.1

**NeoForge V1.21.1**: V1.0.0

**NeoForge V1.21.4**: V1.0.0

_Summary: "The current description details the latest versions of the Mods!"_
___________________

## Now you can take a house with you on your adventures!!
___________________
## How Does it Work?

The mod works like this: you go to the crafting table and craft your house.
Then, with your house in hand, you can place it anywhere!
This makes it easier to explore your world and build your house without much work!

**For example:** Use any Earth, an Earth Gem, a door, and a fence
to craft your house!! If you don't remember the recipe, don't worry!
Because by obtaining any of the recipe items, you unlock it at the crafting table!!

___________________

## What it requires to work:
**Fabric:** download the Fabric API mod , link [here!](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api/version/0.86.1+1.20.1)

**Quilt:** download the Fabric API mod , link [here!](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api/version/0.86.1+1.20.1)

The others don't need anything to function.

___________________

________________________________
# MoreFPS
## This ModPack increases your FPS in Minecraft!!
### Remember that FPS is different for everyone!!
Sometimes you might have 500 FPS and someone else might have 100 FPS, it depends on your computer!!
________________________________
### This ModPack adds several mods to optimize Minecraft,
but each mod loader can make your Minecraft
more optimized than the other. For example: "The ModPack of **Fabric** makes
your Minecraft faster than the Forge ModPack!"
________________________________ 
## The recommendations of each ModLoader!!

**Fabric:**
The ModPack of Fabric It significantly increases your performance compared to other
ModLoaders, but Fabric is a new modloader, so it only supports a few mods. If you 
just want to play with better performance, it's the best recommendation!!

**Forge:**
The ModPack of Forge makes your Minecraft faster, but not as much
as the ModPack of Fabric. But since Forge is quite old, it has many more mods
than Fabric! If you want to play with a lot of mods that make Minecraft
slow, it's good for improving performance, but if you want to play without mods
that make Minecraft slow, it's better to use the Fabric ModPack!

**NeoForge:**
The ModPack of NeoForge increases performance almost the same as Forge's.The 
difference between them is that NeoForge is more stable than Forge, but Forge 
is older, so there are many more mods for Forge. If the mod(s) you want are on 
NeoForge, it's better to use NeoForge than Forge!
________________________________ 
### Summary:
**1|** If you want to play without mods and just optimized Minecraft, I recommend **Fabric!**.

**2|** If you want to play more with mods and with an optimized Minecraft, I recommend seeing if these mod/mods work on **NeoForge!**. Tip: Download the older version of NeoForge, as current versions crash more!

**3|** If you want to play with mods, but they're outdated in older versions or something similar, I recommend **Forge!**.
________________________________
### Any problems with the mod?
**Tell me about the problem on GitHub so I can fix it! :)**

**GitHub**:[Tell me about the mod's issues!!](https://github.com/MiguelYT0d/MoreFPS)
